title: ZoraPublication
description: One line of data/zora_publications.jsonl. Mirrors src/output_schema.py — keep both in sync.

handle.description: Stable ZORA identifier, used for deduplication across harvest runs

keywords.description: Subject keywords from dc.subject, for topic matching

author_orcid.description: ORCID found on this publication, only confidently attributed for single-author items

source_scope.description: Faculty of Economics community UUID in ZORA

harvested_at.description: ISO timestamp of when this record was pulled
